title: run: ignore EIO when flushing at the end, avoid double log
body:
When reading the last of the output from a child process, ignore an EIO, since we already got the HUP indication.

Avoid double-logging errors in our I/O loop when using isolation other than chroot (spotted by @afbjorklund).

comments.body:
Thank you, this patch fixed the issue for me: (showing after vs before)

``` console
tc@test:~$ ./buildah run busybox-working-container date
Wed Jan  9 22:59:56 UTC 2019
tc@test:~$ buildah run busybox-working-container date
ERRO[0000] read container terminal output: input/output error: input/output error 
                                                                                  Wed Jan  9 23:00:10 UTC 2019

```

```
# Run gofmt on version 1.11 and higher
run.go:1840::warning: cyclomatic complexity 48 of function runCopyStdio() is high (> 45) (gocyclo)
make: *** [validate] Error 1
```
